# KRONATRIX Author Website Giveaway

This page is a minimal author lead capture page by KRONATRIX.

Purpose: help selected authors apply for a free author website by listening to a short audio message, entering their author details, adding social profile URLs, optional Amazon URL, and optional named website/book URLs, then opening a pre-filled email to send their book cover image and full book interior PDF to kronatrix.ai@gmail.com.

Privacy note: KRONATRIX does not share or publish the submitted PDF. It is used privately to understand the book, themes, audience, and what is needed for the author website.

Main site: https://kronatrix.co.uk/
Authors site: https://authors.kronatrix.co.uk/


Authors are told to attach their book cover image and full book interior PDF / manuscript by email. They can also attach optional site images such as author photos, book character images, logos, and other book-related visuals. KRONATRIX states that the PDF is not shared or published and is used privately for website planning. Selected author websites usually take up to 48 hours to complete, and KRONATRIX emails the author back with the finished page details and next steps.

Social preview image: share-card-v2.jpg is a 1200 x 630 KRONATRIX branded preview for professional link sharing.
